Authentic ItalianAuténtico Italiano

Our StoryNuestra Historia

Fire & FlourFuego & Harina

At Fuoco E Farina — Italian for "Fire and Flour" — we bring New York's authentic Italian spirit to the heart of Hollywood Beach. Every pizza, every pasta, every sandwich is made fresh with care and real passion.

En Fuoco E Farina — italiano para "Fuego y Harina" — traemos el auténtico espíritu italiano de Nueva York al corazón de Hollywood Beach. Cada pizza, pasta y sándwich se prepara fresco con cuidado y pasión real.

From our Famous Garlic Rolls to our signature Quattro Formaggio — we cook with real ingredients, just as it's always been done.

Desde nuestros famosos Garlic Rolls hasta la Quattro Formaggio — cocinamos con ingredientes reales, como siempre se ha hecho.

Fresh DailyFresco Diario Quality IngredientsIngredientes de Calidad Family FriendlyFamiliar Made with LoveHecho con Amor

Chef's SelectionSelección del Chef

Our SignaturesNuestras Especialidades

New York Napoleon
Our signature thin crust cheese pizza — crispy, golden, and classic New York style.Nuestra pizza de masa fina y queso — crujiente, dorada, estilo Nueva York clásico.
From $3.99Pizza
Spaghetti & Meatballs
Classic pasta with homemade meatballs in our signature tomato sauce. Served with garlic rolls.Pasta clásica con albóndigas caseras en nuestra salsa de tomate. Con garlic rolls.
$24.99Pasta
Chicken Parmigiana
Golden chicken cutlet, marinara sauce, melted mozzarella on a bed of pasta. A true classic.Filete de pollo dorado, salsa marinara y mozzarella derretida sobre pasta. Un clásico real.
$24.99Pasta
Fried Calamari
Crispy fried calamari served with marinara dipping sauce and fresh lemon. The perfect starter.Calamares fritos crujientes con salsa marinara y limón fresco. El aperitivo perfecto.
$12.99Appetizer
Chicken Marsala
Tender chicken cutlet sautéed with mushrooms and marsala wine. Served with pasta.Pollo salteado con champiñones y vino marsala. Servido con pasta.
$26.99Pasta
Fuoco's Special
Ham, Mozzarella, Romano, Ricotta, Cheddar, Bacon. The house legend — not to be missed.Jamón, Mozzarella, Romano, Ricotta, Cheddar, Tocino. La leyenda de la casa.
From $22.50Pizza

See Our WorldConoce Nuestro Mundo

What People SayLo Que Dicen

Real ReviewsReseñas Reales

★★★★★

"Absolutely amazing pizza — by far the best pizza I have ever had. Toni is originally from Italy, then New York. The ingredients are fresh and imported directly from Italy. A true gem on Ocean Drive!"

JF
Jamie F. Google
Hollywood, FL
★★★★★

"Wonderful meal! The Chicken Cutlet Parmigiana was cooked perfectly. My friend had the Penne Alla Vodka — she loved the sauce, great and not acidic at all. We highly recommend this restaurant and will definitely go back!"

MR
Maria R. Google
Local Guide · Hollywood, FL
★★★★★

"Great family-friendly place. Fresh ingredients stand out immediately. The thin crust Italian pizza is the best on the beach. They also have 4 types of draft beer including Peroni and a great wine list. Definitely recommend!"

DL
David L. Google
Fort Lauderdale, FL
★★★★★

"The pizza slices are twice the size of normal slices with a great balance of cheese. The garlic rolls have a lot of garlic and amazing stringy cheese. The chicken wings are crisp, not soggy, with a tasty hot sauce. Best Italian on the beach!"

SC
Sofia C. Google
Dania Beach, FL
★★★★★

"Excelente la pasta y la pizza, platos deliciosos; además la muy buena atención. The owners provide top-notch, quick and knowledgeable service, offering good recommendations. The meat lasagna has a lot of sauce — amazing!"

AL
Ana L. Google
Miami, FL
★★★★★

"Beautiful spot with the Amalfi Coast mural — feels like Italy! The caprese and Greek salads are big enough to share. Fresh, high-quality ingredients in every dish. The Italian sub is huge, more than two people could eat. Outstanding!"

JT
James T. Google
Hollywood, FL
View all reviews on Google ↗ Ver todas las reseñas en Google ↗
